task_completion.description: Verify that the sales_data.csv file has been loaded into Power BI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Data' or 'Fields' pane on the right side of the Power BI Desktop interface shows a table (likely named 'sales_data') containing the 'Sales_Amount' column.

task_completion.description: Verify that the report page is named 'Distribution Analysis'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page tab at the bottom left of the Power BI canvas is labeled 'Distribution Analysis'.

task_completion.description: Verify that bins with a size of 50 were created for the Sales_Amount column.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A binned field (often named 'Sales_Amount (bins)') is visible in the Data/Fields pane with a grouping/binning icon, OR the X-axis of the chart clearly shows intervals of 50.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Clustered Column Chart is present on the canvas representing the histogram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Clustered Column Chart visual is on the report canvas. Its X-axis should use the binned Sales_Amount field, and the Y-axis should represent a count or frequency of sales.

task_completion.description: Verify that the two required DAX measures (Median_Sales and Stdev_Sales) have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data/Fields pane shows 'Median_Sales' and 'Stdev_Sales' with a small calculator icon next to them, indicating they are calculated measures.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Multi-row Card visual is present and displays the correct measure values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Multi-row Card visual is on the canvas displaying the values for Median_Sales (approx 5019.30) and Stdev_Sales (approx 2845.37).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the actual Power BI Desktop application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the standard Power BI Desktop GUI (ribbon, canvas, visualizations pane, data pane). It should not be a text editor, Python script, or terminal window.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use static text boxes to fake the measure results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values 5019.30 and 2845.37 should appear inside a genuine Multi-row Card visual (identifiable by its specific formatting and selection borders), not as standalone static text boxes inserted via the 'Insert Text box' feature.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not bypass the GUI by using terminal commands to generate a fake .pbix file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show step-by-step interaction with the Power BI interface (clicking, dragging, typing DAX formulas) rather than just terminal commands executing a script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected calculated values are 5019.30 for Median_Sales (using the MEDIAN DAX function) and 2845.37 for Stdev_Sales (using the STDEV.P DAX function for population standard deviation). The histogram must use a bin size of 50.
